auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in with your academic account.
auth.registerSubtitle: Join your major and activate your academic workspace.
auth.termsLink: privacy policy and terms of use
auth.termsTitle: Privacy Policy and Terms of Use
termsBody: Student Hub stores your academic profile, submissions, grades, and notifications so your school can manage learning workflows securely.
You agree to upload only academic material you are authorized to share and to keep your credentials private.
Administrators and assigned professors may review academic activity connected to their responsibilities.
auth.registrationSuccess: Registration complete. Check your email to verify your account.
auth.verifySuccess: Your email has been verified. You can now sign in.
auth.verifyFailed: This verification link is invalid or expired.
auth.resetSubtitle: Enter your email address and we will send a secure reset link.
auth.resetSent: If an account exists, a reset link has been sent.
auth.newPasswordSubtitle: Use a strong password you do not use elsewhere.
auth.forcePasswordSubtitle: Your professor account uses a temporary password. Change it before continuing.

hero.title: Your Academic World, Unified.
hero.subtitle: Student Hub connects students, professors, and administrators through assignments, calendars, announcements, files, grades, and notifications.

about.title: Built for disciplined academic coordination.
about.body: Student Hub gives institutions a single, reliable system for course structure, assignment workflows, group projects, grades, calendar events, announcements, and student activity monitoring.

pillars.title: Clear ownership
pillars.text: Each role sees the tools, data, and actions that match their responsibilities.

pillars.title: Operational visibility
pillars.text: Dashboards surface submissions, deadlines, announcements, and progress before issues become urgent.

pillars.title: Reliable communication
pillars.text: In-app notifications and branded emails keep every academic event traceable.

items.title: Assignment Management
items.text: Create TP, TD, and project assignments with files, deadlines, review states, grades, and feedback.

items.title: Academic Calendar
items.text: Publish major-specific or institution-wide events with priority colors and list views.

items.title: Announcements
items.text: Admins publish directly while professor announcements go through an approval workflow.

items.title: Role-Based Access
items.text: Admins, professors, and students get distinct dashboards and API permissions.

items.title: File Uploads
items.text: Cloudinary-backed raw uploads with frontend and backend validation for allowed academic files.

items.title: Grade Tracking
items.text: Grades, approval rates, and activity scores are calculated server-side and displayed clearly.

items.title: Group Projects
items.text: Professors create groups, assign leaders, and review project links from one place.

items.title: Real-time Notifications
items.text: Every important action creates an in-app notification and an email.

how.title: From registration to daily academic work.

steps.title: Sign Up
steps.text: Students register with their major, year, contact information, and verified email.

steps.title: Join Your Major
steps.text: Courses, assignments, announcements, and calendar events become filtered to the correct academic path.

steps.title: Access Everything
steps.text: Submit work, join groups, track grades, read announcements, and manage your profile.

footer.body: For academic teams that need a sharper way to coordinate coursework, communication, and progress.

users.title: User Management
users.subtitle: Search, filter, activate, deactivate, and create professor accounts.
users.sendWelcome: Send welcome email with temporary credentials

activity.empty: Student activity requires an authorized professor activity endpoint.

home.reminderBody: Review overdue assignments, pending submissions, and professor notices before the next deadline.
